project_common.outline_style: 2px solid outline included in sprite dimensions

shared_attributes.features: short front legs, large eyes, thick tail

context.role: Pre-game state animation for player character
context.screen_position: Fixed at x=100px from left edge, y=0 (ground level)
context.usage_scenario: Displayed before game starts, waiting for player input

visual_specification.shape: T-Rex dinosaur with upright posture, short arms, large head
visual_specification.texture: pixel art, flat color, no gradients

animation.description: Subtle breathing animation - frame 1: neutral stance, frame 2: slight body movement

visual_specification.details: Eyes open, standing still, minimal movement to indicate readiness

relationships.shared_with: Same base sprite dimensions and color as all player states
relationships.differences_from: player_run has faster animation (12 FPS vs 6 FPS), player_jump is static single frame
